statement: The Australian information classification scheme (OFFICIAL, OFFICIAL:Sensitive, PROTECTED, SECRET, TOP SECRET) is defined by the PSPF; agent-enterprise's OFFICIAL/trust tagging aligns with this scheme.

evidence.quote: The PSPF defines the protective marking scheme: OFFICIAL, OFFICIAL:Sensitive, and security classifications PROTECTED, SECRET, TOP SECRET

falsifier: PSPF policy showing the scheme no longer uses OFFICIAL:Sensitive / PROTECTED labels would falsify this.
